ogTitle: Coominglah vs Coominglah Forest: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Coominglah and Coominglah Forest.
heading: Coominglah vs Coominglah Forest — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Coominglah, Queensland and Coominglah Forest, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Coominglah has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Coominglah Forest (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Coominglah or Coominglah Forest safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Coominglah has a flood risk score of 43/100, while Coominglah Forest scores 42/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Coominglah scores 60/100 for bushfire risk. Coominglah Forest scores 62/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Coominglah or Coominglah Forest?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Coominglah has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.85% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
